mapper.select: SELECT DATE(actual_check_out_time) as date, IFNULL(SUM(room_amount), 0) as roomAmount, IFNULL(SUM(extra_amount), 0) as extraAmount, IFNULL(SUM(total_amount), 0) as amount, COUNT(*) as count FROM t_order WHERE status = 'checkedOut' AND actual_check_out_time >= #{startTime} AND actual_check_out_time < #{endTime} GROUP BY DATE(actual_check_out_time) ORDER BY date ASC

SELECT r.*, rt.name AS type_name, r.price FROM t_room r LEFT JOIN t_room_type rt ON r.type_id = rt.id WHERE r.status = 'idle' AND r.id NOT IN ( SELECT o.room_id FROM t_order o WHERE o.status IN ('pending', 'checkedIn') AND o.check_in_time < #{expectedCheckOutTime} AND o.expected_check_out_time > #{checkInTime} ) ORDER BY r.floor, r.room_no

SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, c.phone as customer_phone, r.room_no, rt.name as room_type_name FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_room r ON o.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN t_room_type rt ON r.type_id = rt.id WHERE o.status = 'checkedIn' AND o.expected_check_out_time < NOW() ORDER BY o.expected_check_out_time ASC LIMIT #{page}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_order WHERE status = 'checkedIn' AND expected_check_out_time < NOW()

SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, c.phone as customer_phone, r.room_no, rt.name as room_type_name FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_room r ON o.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN t_room_type rt ON r.type_id = rt.id WHERE o.status = 'pending' AND DATE(o.check_in_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY o.check_in_time ASC

SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, c.phone as customer_phone, r.room_no, rt.name as room_type_name FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_room r ON o.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN t_room_type rt ON r.type_id = rt.id WHERE o.status = 'checkedIn' AND DATE(o.expected_check_out_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY o.expected_check_out_time ASC

SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, r.room_no, rt.name as room_type_name FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_room r ON o.room_id = r.id LEFT JOIN t_room_type rt ON r.type_id = rt.id WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC

SELECT o.*, c.name as customer_name, c.phone as customer_phone, r.room_no FROM t_order o LEFT JOIN t_customer c ON o.customer_id = c.id LEFT JOIN t_room r ON o.room_id = r.id WHERE o.status = 'checkedIn' AND o.deposit < o.total_amount AND o.actual_check_out_time IS NULL ORDER BY o.create_time ASC
